_comment: Roblox MODEL asset IDs for the claw rig meshes, uploaded from Blender (creator lylou38000, 2026-06-16). Templates live in ReplicatedStorage.Assets.ClawMeshes; ClawHub->Claw, Jaw->ClawJaw, Tip->ClawTip in the builder.
_comment2: Hero meshes for the per-rank archetypes (uploaded headlessly via MCP 2026-06-17): Deck=universal chassis, TurretRing=rank3/4 body, DrillColumn=rank5, ReactorCore=rank9, TitanTorso=rank8/10, HoverPod=rank7. Imported into ClawMeshes; builder clones them.
